caption: A book cover titled "No More Time" by "GREG DELANTY" is centered against a solid blue background. The cover features a dark background at the top with the title and author's name in white and red text. Below the text is a grey-toned illustration of a small primate with large eyes and a long tail clinging to a white tree trunk. The primate is facing left, gripping the bark with its hand and feet. The book begins in a tilted position, leaning toward the left. It then shifts to a perfectly upright, vertical orientation. Finally, the book tilts back to the left, returning to its initial slanted position. The lighting and background remain constant throughout these movements, focusing entirely on the shifting angle of the book cover.
